messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- APO: growth archetype
- BAX: growth archetype
- BKR: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: Baker Hughes Company $BKR Shares Purchased by Mitsubishi UFJ Asset Management Co. Ltd. - MarketBeat
    Summary: Baker Hughes Company $BKR Shares Purchased by Mitsubishi UFJ Asset Management Co. Ltd. MarketBeat

[1] Title: Is It Too Late To Look At Baker Hughes (BKR) After A 90% One-Year Rally? - simplywall.st
    Summary: Is It Too Late To Look At Baker Hughes (BKR) After A 90% One-Year Rally? simplywall.st

[2] Title: Jennison Associates LLC Sells 54,193 Shares of Apollo Global Management Inc. $APO - MarketBeat
    Summary: Jennison Associates LLC Sells 54,193 Shares of Apollo Global Management Inc. $APO MarketBeat

[3] Title: Baxter International Still Has A Path To Upside - Seeking Alpha
    Summary: Baxter International Still Has A Path To Upside Seeking Alpha

[4] Title: Baxter International (BAX) director awarded 12,836 fully vested shares - Stock Titan
    Summary: Baxter International (BAX) director awarded 12,836 fully vested shares Stock Titan

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Generic institutional ownership filing showing an asset manager bought BKR shares—no new information about the company's growth prospects or fundamentals."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["BKR"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Company-specific investment analysis discussing BKR's 90% rally and whether upside remains, directly relevant to evaluating the BKR growth position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Generic institutional flow report showing Jennison sold APO shares—no insight into APO's actual business performance or growth trajectory."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["BAX"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Company-specific analysis on Seeking Alpha discussing BAX's path to upside, directly relevant to evaluating the BAX growth position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 4,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Routine director compensation disclosure with no material impact on BAX's growth outlook or investment thesis."
  }
]
```
